{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/127685842?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/geoo115/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/geoo115/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/geoo115/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/geoo115/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/geoo115", "id": 127685842, "login": "geoo115", "node_id": "U_kgDOB5xU0g", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/geoo115/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/geoo115/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/geoo115/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/geoo115/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/geoo115/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/geoo115", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-20706", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:L/UI:N/VC:L/VI:N/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-863", "name": "Incorrect Authorization"}], "description": "## Summary

PR #37698 added checkDownloadTokenScope to /raw/*, /media/*, and attachment download web endpoints. The /archive/* endpoint (repo.Download in routers/web/repo/repo.go:372) was not included in the fix. This endpoint accepts OAuth2 tokens via webAuth.AllowOAuth2 (registered at routers/web/web.go:1649-1652) but does not call checkDownloadTokenScope or CheckRepoScopedToken.

A personal access token with any non-repository scope (e.g., read:issue or read:misc) can download full repository archives (zip/tar.gz) of private repositories the token owner has access to.

## Impact

Scope escalation: tokens scoped to non-repository categories can access full repository content through the archive download endpoint. Higher impact than endpoints fixed in #37698 because /archive/* serves the entire repository.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Create a personal access token with ONLY read:misc scope
2. Access: GET /{owner}/{private-repo}/archive/main.tar.gz
3. Archive is served (200 OK) instead of being rejected (403 Forbidden)

Compare with fixed endpoints:
- GET /{owner}/{private-repo}/raw/branch/main/README.md correctly returns 403

## Root Cause

Download function in routers/web/repo/repo.go:372 does not call checkDownloadTokenScope. The outer group middleware reqUnitCodeReader checks repository permission but not token scope.

The API equivalent (/api/v1/repos/{owner}/{repo}/archive/*) IS properly scoped via tokenRequiresScopes(AccessTokenScopeCategoryRepository). The git HTTP endpoints are scoped via CheckRepoScopedToken in httpBase.

## Suggested Fix

Add checkDownloadTokenScope(ctx) to Download and InitiateDownload in routers/web/repo/repo.go. The function already exists in routers/web/repo/download.go (same package).

## Discovery Method

Variant analysis of PR #37698 — reviewed all web routes with webAuth.AllowOAuth2 middleware.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00403, "percentile": 0.32576}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-cr4g-f395-h25h", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-16T23:42:04Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-cr4g-f395-h25h", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-cr4g-f395-h25h"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-20706"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-16T23:42:04Z", "references": ["https://github.com/go-gitea/gitea/security/advisories/GHSA-cr4g-f395-h25h", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-cr4g-f395-h25h"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/go-gitea/gitea/security-advisories/GHSA-cr4g-f395-h25h", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/go-gitea/gitea", "summary": "Gitea: Token scope bypass on web archive download endpoint", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-16T23:42:05Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-cr4g-f395-h25h", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.26.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "code.gitea.io/gitea"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 1.26.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: Gitea: Token scope bypass on web archive download endpoint
